top_signals.title: Sizewell B granted 20-year life extension
top_signals.summary: The government has granted the Sizewell B nuclear power plant a 20-year lifetime extension, meaning it will now continue to generate electricity until 2055. Owner EDF and investor Centrica said it had agreed terms with the Department of Energy Security and Net Zero, in a deal that will see its owners paid considerably less for [...]

top_signals.title: Mount Royal University confirms breach as hackers claim attack
top_signals.summary: Mount Royal University in Calgary says hackers stole and then deleted data from its file storage systems after breaching the university's network. [...]

top_signals.title: Kaoru Mitoma involved in minor traffic accident in Tokyo
top_signals.summary: Prominent Japanese soccer player Kaoru Mitoma hit a cyclist in Tokyo while driving at around 8.45 a.m. on Wednesday, according to a statement from his agency.
